title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cognizant Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cognizant Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Ghaziabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant Digital Technologies:
Cognizant Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant Digital Technologies!
